mapper.select: SELECT el.*, r.reservation_no, p.title AS performance_title, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, sc.show_date, sc.show_time FROM entrance_log el JOIN reservation r ON el.reservation_id = r.reservation_id JOIN schedule sc ON el.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id JOIN performance p ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id JOIN member m ON el.member_id = m.member_id WHERE el.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT el.*, r.reservation_no, p.title AS performance_title, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, sc.show_date, sc.show_time FROM entrance_log el JOIN reservation r ON el.reservation_id = r.reservation_id JOIN schedule sc ON el.schedule_id = sc.schedule_id JOIN performance p ON sc.performance_id = p.performance_id JOIN member m ON el.member_id = m.member_id WHERE el.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY el.checked_in_at DESC
